zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Neville於大約1462年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親Sir John Neville33歲，母親Isabel Ingoldesthorpe23歲。她於1481年與Sir William Stoner結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1486年11月5日在英國威爾斯尼德享年25歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏比善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Neville于大约1462年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲Sir John Neville33岁，母亲Isabel Ingoldesthorpe23岁。她于1481年与Sir William Stoner结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1486年11月5日在英国威尔斯尼德享年25岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏比善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Neville was born about 1462, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir John Neville, was 33 and her mother, Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, was 23. She married Sir William Stoner in 1481. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 5 November 1486, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 25, and was buried in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Neville est née environ 1462, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Neville, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Stoner en 1481. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 novembre 1486, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterrée à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Neville um 1462 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Neville 33 und ihre Mutter Isabel Ingoldesthorpe 23. Sie hat 1481 Sir William Stoner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 5. November 1486 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Neville è nata il circa 1462 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Neville, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Stoner nel 1481. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 novembre 1486, nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolta a Bisham, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Nevilleが約1462年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Nevilleは33歳，母Isabel Ingoldesthorpeは23歳であった。1481年にSir William Stonerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1486年11月5日にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドで25歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアビシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Neville(이)가 대략 1462년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Neville(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Ingoldesthorpe(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1481년 Sir William Stoner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 11월 5일 영국 웨일스 그w이네드에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 비샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1462, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Neville, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Stoner em 1481. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1486, em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom, com 25 anos, e foi sepultada em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Neville родилась около 1462 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Neville было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Stoner в 1481 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 ноября 1486 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет и была похоронена в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Neville nació aproximadamente 1462, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Neville, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir William Stoner en 1481. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1486, en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultada en Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
